justification: The diff successfully migrates from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21, but it does not utilize any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., virtual threads, pattern matching for switch, records, etc.). The migration of JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @After, @Test) to JUnit 5 (@BeforeEach, @AfterEach, @Test) and assertions (Assert.assertEquals to Assertions.assertEquals) is correct and clean. The pom.xml updates are coherent, adding JUnit Jupiter and updating Surefire, though the exclusion of JUnit 4 from allure-junit4 might be unnecessary if the project is fully migrated, but it prevents conflicts. The diff is focused and lacks spurious churn.
